edge_hypothesis: RSI pullback ACCEPT (rp39d8e1, PF=1.21, DD=9.2%, 38 trades) proves the template has structural edge on ETH. That spec used default EMA_200 trend + EMA_50 slope — slow filters that only detect established mega-trends. By shortening to EMA_100 trend + EMA_20 slope, we detect trend resumptions earlier after pullbacks, entering before the move fully develops. This should INCREASE trade count (catching moderate trends that EMA_200 misses) while preserving the core signal: price above trend EMA + slope rising + RSI in pullback zone. Wider stops (1.5-2.0x ATR) avoid the catastrophic DD=185% blowout that killed rp6ht5a8 (which used 1.0x stops). RSI thresholds loosened to 45/55 for more trade opportunities. Regime assumption: TRENDING (pullbacks in uptrends). Invalidation: if PF < 1.0 with 50+ trades, faster trend detection does not improve signal quality — the EMA_200 filter is essential, not just preferred.

variants.name: rsi_fast_trend_wide_safety
variants.description: RSI pullback with EMA_100 trend filter (faster than default 200) and EMA_20 slope (faster than default 50). RSI<45 admits more trades than default RSI<40. Stop at 2.0x ATR prevents the DD blowouts seen with 1.0x stops. TP at 4.0x ATR for a 2:1 R:R that overcomes fee drag. Tests whether faster trend detection improves the proven RSI pullback signal.
entry_long: Close > EMA_100 confirms intermediate uptrend (faster detection than EMA_200).
EMA_20 slope rising (EMA_20 current > EMA_20 previous bar).
entry_short: EMA_20 slope falling (EMA_20 current < EMA_20 previous bar).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: faster EMA may whipsaw in ranging markets, producing false trend signals
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_100 faster trend filter
rsi_pullback volatility gate — 2.0x ATR stop safety

variants.name: rsi_fast_trend_balanced
variants.description: RSI pullback with EMA_100 trend and EMA_20 slope, but tighter R:R (2:1 via 1.5x stop / 3.0x TP). Tests whether faster profit realization with smaller stops improves consistency. RSI<42 is slightly more selective than the wide_safety variant to compensate for narrower stops.
entry_short: RSI_14 >= 58 indicates quality rally in downtrend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1.5x stop may still chop out in volatile pullbacks
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_100 faster trend filter
rsi_pullback volatility gate — 1.5x ATR balanced stop

variants.name: rsi_very_fast_trend_aggressive
variants.description: Most aggressive variant: EMA_50 trend + EMA_10 slope for maximum trade frequency. Tests the outer boundary of how fast trend detection can go before signal quality degrades. RSI<45 for volume. 2.5x ATR stop provides maximum breathing room. If this works, the pullback signal is robust across trend filter speeds. If PF collapses vs the EMA_100 variants, trend filter speed has diminishing returns.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: very fast EMA_50 trend may flip frequently causing overtrading
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_50 very fast trend filter
rsi_pullback volatility gate — 2.5x ATR widest stop
